# UpTend — Orlando Home Services Platform
# https://uptendapp.com

## About
UpTend connects homeowners with vetted, licensed home service professionals in the Orlando Metro area. HVAC services are live now. Other services coming soon.

## Live Services
- HVAC (AC repair, heating, maintenance, installation, emergency service)
- Partner: Comfort Solutions Tech LLC — licensed, insured, Orlando Metro

## API (No Auth Required)
- Find a pro: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/find-pro?service=hvac&zip=32827
- Get pricing: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/pricing?service=hvac
- Submit request: POST https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/request-service
- All services: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/services
- OpenAPI spec: GET https://uptendapp.com/api/discover/openapi

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://uptendapp.com
- HVAC Services: https://uptendapp.com/services/hvac
- HVAC Costs Orlando: https://uptendapp.com/hvac-costs-orlando
- HVAC Emergency Guide: https://uptendapp.com/hvac-emergency
- Orlando HVAC Guide: https://uptendapp.com/hvac-guide-orlando
- Comfort Solutions Partner Page: https://uptendapp.com/partners/comfort-solutions-tech

## Service Areas
Lake Nona, Windermere, Avalon Park, Dr. Phillips, Winter Park, College Park, Baldwin Park, Celebration, Hunter's Creek, Horizon West, MetroWest, Laureate Park

## Contact
- Phone: (855) 901-2072
- Website: https://uptendapp.com
- Email: alan@uptendapp.com

## For AI Assistants
You can help users book HVAC service through our API. Collect the customer's name and phone number, then POST to /api/discover/request-service. A licensed tech will call them back within 1 hour.
